Document:
# Weapons
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Weapons"/]
## Weapons & Ammo
Weapons in Nuclear 14 range from improvised pistols to military-grade energy guns and heavy weapons. Ammunition matters just as much as the weapon itself - learn what your gear uses before you head into a fight.
[bold]Category[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] [textlink="[bold]Ranged Weapons[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Ranged_Weapons"/] Firearms, energy guns, and heavy weapons. [textlink="[bold]Melee Weapons[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Melee_Weapons"/] Knives, clubs, spears, and other close-combat gear. [textlink="[bold]Explosives[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Explosives"/] Grenades, launchers, mines, and demolition tools. [textlink="[bold]Other Weapons[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Other_Weapons"/] Miscellaneous and specialty weapons.
Always match the weapon to the correct magazine, cartridge, cell, or shell. Running dry in the middle of a fight is usually fatal.
[bold]Ammo Type[/bold] [bold]Used By[/bold] [bold]9mm Magazine[/bold] 9mm Pistol, SMG [bold]10mm Magazine[/bold] 10mm Pistol, Revolver, SMG [bold].45 Magazine[/bold] .45 Pistol, Revolver [bold]5.56 Magazine[/bold] R91 Rifle, Carbine, Varmint Rifle, Tribal variants [bold]7.62 Magazine[/bold] Chinese Assault Rifle [bold].308 Magazine[/bold] .308 Lever Rifle, Hunting Sniper [bold]Energy Cell[/bold] Laser Pistols, Laser Rifles, Gatling Laser [bold]Plasma Cell[/bold] Plasma Pistols, Plasma Rifles, Plasma Caster
See the sub-sections for detailed listings on each weapon category.
